spectral_dimension_uv.description: UV spectral dimension at Planck scale

asymptotic_safety.notes: From η_N = 2 at non-Gaussian fixed point

cdt.notes: Monte Carlo simulation. Fit formula D_S(σ) = a - b/(c+σ) gives ~3/2 at σ→0, but raw MC gives 1.80±0.25

loop_quantum_gravity.notes: Spin foam calculation. Space-TIME d_s=2 at Planck scale. Spatial section gives d_s=1.5 at intermediate scales. Trans-Planckian gives d_s=4 or 8/3 depending on area spectrum.

ncg_kappa_minkowski.notes: κ-Minkowski spacetime. 3 commuting spatial dirs, time noncommuting → d_s=3. Benedetti conjecture: d_s = dim(maximal commutative subspace)

causal_sets.notes: ANOMALOUS: d_s INCREASES beyond d_top for small causal sets. Does not follow the d_s→2 pattern. Excluded from PySR fits.

emergent_gravity.notes: PySR prediction from cross-theory pattern: d_s = 2.0
